rationale: Active war continues at maximum background level; Trump's Iran deal rhetoric and condemnation of Beirut strikes are words only — no confirmed shift in US support for Ukraine.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war continues — no qualitative change
top_events.summary: Active combat persists across Ukrainian territory; no new escalation or de-escalation confirmed this cycle. Daily life under war conditions unchanged.

top_events.title: Trump condemns Israel's Beirut attack, says Iran deal still close
top_events.summary: Trump's focus on Iran deal and Middle East diplomacy is rhetoric only; no confirmed reduction in US military or financial support for Ukraine this cycle.

top_events.title: EU set to hold membership talks with Ukraine
top_events.summary: Formal EU accession talks advancing is a positive long-term signal for Ukraine's future, though no immediate change to wartime conditions.
